items.title: How Pakistan helped secure a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran
items.dek: Pakistan has a historic relationship with Iran, but an agreement was far from certain, writes the BBC’s Caroline Davies

items.title: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
items.dek: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.
items.body: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.
